About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: Here's a little bit about me and my journey in tech.
About.bio: I am a Full-Stack Developer from Tunisia, with a Computer Science degree . I have experience building full-stack applications, architecting scalable solutions, and collaborating with teams. I enjoy creating elegant UI components and solving complex problems with efficient code.
